GOOD TO KNOW

Before you order.

  • All orders are prepay before cook — no exceptions.
  • Cook windows are limited to 8 plates per batch — we cook in batches, not on demand.
  • Pickup only (no delivery unless DoorDash is live in your area).
  • Pickup at 2988 Frank Brown Ln, 4 PM–12 AM.

    FINAL STEP

    Lock it in.

    Send the exact total above via any of these, then screenshot it and message us to confirm your cook window:

    • Venmo — @trappanyaki
    • Chime — @trappanyaki
    • PayPal — @trappanyaki
    • Square (card, no app needed) — Pay with Card

    FOR TEAMS · FAMILIES · FUNCTIONS

    Catering that shows up.

    TRAPPANYAKI does live hibachi catering — real setup, real fire, real food.

    🎉 Private Event

    Packages starting at $1,500 for 20–50 guests (live hibachi, full setup). Full production events (50–150+ guests) start at $4,000.

    🏢 Corporate / Office

    Starting at $35/head for team lunches and scales up from there. We handle setup, cooking, and service — you handle headcount.

    ❓ Something Else

    Got something else in mind? Drop the details (date, guest count, vibe) and we'll let you know if we can make it happen.

    NEED TO KNOW

    FAQ.

    Can I cancel my order?

    No refunds, but we'll happily reschedule you to the next available cook window — just DM us.

    Do you accommodate allergies or substitutions?

    Yes — let us know when you order and we'll do our best to accommodate allergy requests or ingredient swaps.

    Can I change my order after I pay?

    Once your order is confirmed, it's locked in for that cook window — no changes after that, so double-check before you send payment.

    How far ahead do I need to order?

    For same-day pickup, get your order in before 11 PM. After that, you're looking at the next available batch.
